Scenario:
` XML for the initial access stage of the Versa Director Zero Day Exploitation campaign targeting the Energy industry:
```xml
Energy Intermediate The Versa Director Zero Day Exploitation campaign aims to gain unauthorized access to energy infrastructure through exploiting vulnerabilities in internet-facing applications.
name=Versa Director Zero Day Exploitation Financial Gain Expert
Energy Internet-facing assets Web
AVAILABLE_SURFACES: ["Device theft", "Weak passwords", "Improper configuration", "Vulnerability", "Internet-facing assets", ...]
AVAILABLE_VECTORS: ["External/Removable media", "Loss or Theft of equipment", "Attrition", "Web", ...]
Exploit Public-Facing Application Internet-facing assets Web CVE-2020-10189 [CWE-200]: Apache Struts2 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability CAPEC ID: 121 - Exploit Non-Production Interfaces The threat actors exploited a remote code execution vulnerability (CVE-2020-10189) in an internet-facing Apache Struts2 application within the energy organization's perimeter. They leveraged this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code on the targeted system, gaining initial access to the network.
The Versa Director Zero Day Exploitation campaign began by exploiting a known vulnerability in an internet-facing Apache Struts2 application, allowing threat actors to gain initial access to the energy organization's network.
